loginPage.text_237: Sign in to your account to track your recovery progress.
loginPage.loginError: We couldn't sign you in. Check your email and password, then try again.
loginPage.googleError: We couldn't sign you in with Google. For an existing account, use your email and password.

registerPage.text_249: Create an account to activate the protection system and education modules.
registerPage.registrationError: Registration wasn't completed. Check your details or try another email address.

forgotPasswordPage.heading: Account recovery
forgotPasswordPage.placeholderBody: The email reset flow is waiting for a verified delivery adapter.
forgotPasswordPage.placeholderDetail: We will not pretend an email was sent. For this prototype, contact support so identity and account ownership can be reviewed safely.

create-groupPage.text_273: Bagikan kode grup ini ke mahasiswa Anda
create-groupPage.text_278: Sebagai Dosen/Pendamping, buat grup untuk mengawasi mahasiswa Anda.
create-groupPage.text_281: Kode grup unik akan dibuat secara otomatis. Bagikan kode ini ke mahasiswa melalui WA.
create-groupPage.error: The group couldn't be created. Please try again.

partnerInvitationPage.title: Accept the accountability partner role?
partnerInvitationPage.description: Your consent creates an active relationship for reviewing protection-change requests. You can leave the relationship according to the account policy.
partnerInvitationPage.privacyBody: You will not receive the user's URLs, domains, browsing history, mood, intention, or private journal.
partnerInvitationPage.errorBody: This invitation is invalid, already used, or older than seven days.
partnerInvitationPage.successBody: You can now review protection-change requests that are still valid.
partnerInvitationPage.successNotice: Partner decisions are limited to this relationship and do not reveal browsing data or private recovery notes.
